runner: Claude Fable 5 via Claude Code (VS Code extension)
notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries, DPR-aware full-page canvas. Infinite procedural parallax (nothing tiles): sum-of-sines mountain/hill ridges with warm crest rim light, hashed pine/round tree band, telephone poles with sagging wires, hashed road cracks, scrolling centre dashes, and a fastest foreground silhouette strip (grass tufts, cattails, fence posts) that passes in front of the car. Sunset grade with sun disc + haze bands, twinkling stars, drifting two-tone clouds, occasional bird flocks. Coupe with no-slip wheel spin (omega = v/r, spoked rims + valve dot), suspension bob and pitch decoupled from the wheels, headlight beam and taillight glow (additive), exhaust particles, driver silhouette, vignette + colour-grade overlay. During authoring a stray malformed draft line and an unused helper were removed before finalizing; JS was machine syntax-checked.
